review_title: PlayPlay, a tool designed to tell stories in the organization and make high-quality videos.
description: PlayPlay is based on the development of a compact and agile environment, since it offers the necessary tools in an intuitive format, without incorporating functionalities that we never use, but with which we are going to need to tell a story and create an exceptional video.We can easily switch between the screens related to our designs and see the different variations, maintain versions that allow us to perform evolutionary maintenance based on the behavior of our marketing campaigns and without a doubt, grow our brand.
author: Marianela F.
pros: PlayPlay's design has been based on creating an interactive and easy-to-use environment.We can create videos and save them in the specific format that we are going to need, either to publish them on social networks, YouTube or our website. We can also create animations by incorporating dynamic elements, which can be, for example, images, music, custom logos, among others, and we can add customization to any part of our video based on our needs, to apply transitions, colors and effects that we may require, in addition to manipulating the duration and format of our final product.
cons: PlayPlay is quite compact in terms of the available functionalities, which allow you to make spectacular videos with very little effort, with professional results, however, it may be that in some cases in which we require a very specialized design, we need some additional tools to those existing in the current version. However, PlayPlay is widely used and valued for its simplicity, and for the ease it has to tell spectacular stories with very little effort.

review_title: Hands down, the best platform for professional, short-form videos
description: The biggest business problem we're solving is the fact that we can actually create and use video in our content. We were never able to do that well before. Also, that the videos are professionally designed, and so that justifies the cost.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The platform is really easy to use. The standout features, to me, are the way building and editing proceses are set up. It's like you are creating a story board, and then all the options for motion design, text, imagery can be added with a drag and drop. Also, you can start with a template if you don't know what to do. Once you've made your video, it's one click to look at the whole thing (with hilarious videos while you wait), and then easy to go back and edit. One of the reasons we use PlayPlay is that making videos before required a person or an expert. Who has time and budget for that??
cons: Since I am at b2b company, it would be cool to see a few more templates for business people. But honestly, most of our customers and employees want to be entertained. I struggled a little with how much text was too much and how t change the colors, but finally figured that out. Also, I was looking for help and wasn't sure how I could get to the knowledge base. The customer success team guided me there. They were very helpful.

author: Nico D.
pros: it's easy to use indeed, but useless since the video generated had nothing to do with my script
cons: The video generated had nothing to do with my script
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very user-friendly compared to other software, 30 minutes only to become an expert user ;) No need to call for a video agency, we can make videos ourselves with my team (8 videos a month!) Cool templates to make videos in 3 minutes when you are a bit in a rush Ability to set your own branding with no additional cost
cons: Nothing to say - maybe that the software is not in French, but it's not a problem within our company
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A friend introduced me PlayPlay, now I can't stop creating amazing videos with it!
description: So far I have enjoyed creating amazing videos with PlayPlay, kudos!
author: Rono K.
pros: I really love how PlayPlay deliberately ensured access to quality video editing features that are easy to use.
cons: I do not like how some of the best features of PlayPlay require one to upgrade.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Not bad but needs several improvements.
author: Muhammad M.
pros: It has several templates to use and they are very simple and easy.
cons: Well, not all the functions are great, specifically the subtitle feature. It's not good enough.

review_title: Very powerful and time-saving tools for video making
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to use, with nice GUI. It contains a huge number of different and very useful templates that are sources of inspiration for new videos. Overall, it saves significant amount of time during video making and editing. It constantly receives updates and a lot of features improve day by day.
cons: Perhaps the subtitles insertion tool is a bit difficult and non-practical to use

review_title: Audio Visual Design in a Box
description: Excellent software, excellent support and great price.
author: Raul M.
pros: Great tool for quick and high quality content creation. This software will take your video and animation creation to the next level. Its super easy and fast tp use. Everyone can create great content with this tool. Cost is great.
cons: Limited to templates but that has NEVER been an issue for us. We never run out and they keep adding fresh content often.

author: Kareem M.
pros: it is excellent software, I enjoyed its user interface, and it has many wonderful templates.
cons: I don't have any complaints yet about PlayPlay software.

description: I love it, use it daily, it help me in my day-to-day tasks!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Create a great video content in literally 5 mins like a pro
cons: I think, so far the software is great! I don't have a specific issue right now
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Muy buena recomendable buena edición y opiniones muy funcionales
author: Jose G.
pros: Su gran capacidad de edición de video sus multiples opciones,plantillas muy buenas y de facil manejabilidad
cons: Quizas algun tutorial para personas inexpertas en este ambito

review_title: PlayPlay, meilleur outil de montage video
author: Paulette H.
pros: Je n'avais aucune notion en montage vidéo or je suis dans le domaine du marketing et communication. Grâce à PlayPlay, je fais des vidéos professionnelles et attrayantes en un bref de temps sans difficulté. Je recommande cet outil à tout personne n'était pas vidéaste et qui désire fait de meilleure vidéo pour ces business lui même ; PlatPlay est notre solution.
cons: PlayPlay doit prédefinir ses tarifs normalement plus besoin d'envoyer une demande avant d'obtenir un prix. Nous souhaitons voir les prix sur la page tarifs de votre site web. Cela nous permettra de prévoir notre budget plus le tôt possible

review_title: Super logiciel de création de vidéos
author: servane D.
pros: > logiciel super simple à prendre en main, en enchaîne la création de vidéos : que ce soit pour des tutos, de courtes vidéos, des retours d'expérience, des vidéos marketing, des podcast... à chaque vidéo son visuel et son besoin de sous titres > le fait de pouvoir enregistrer sa vidéo directement ur playplay était la fonctionnalité qu'il manquait, depuis c'est que du bonheur > pouvoir personnaliser le logo / couleurs de ses vidéos en fonction de sa marque est top ! > une vidéo playplay, c'est toujours plus agréable à regarder grâce à toute la personnalisation qu'on peut y mettre, et c'est beau !!
cons: Difficile de trouver un inconvénient pour le moment, je suis très satisfaite de mon utilisation au quotidien

description: Utilizzo questo programma di editing da diverso tempo ormai e posso giudicare la mia esperienza più che positiva
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ottimo software che consente la creazione di video in pochi minuti. Grazie alla sua facilità di utilizzo già dopo poco tempo si riescono a padroneggiare le skill necessarie a creare un buon video e a condividerlo con i propri colleghi
cons: Per adesso non ho trovato difetti significativi, unica pecca forse è che durante il periodo di prova si è un po’ troppo limitati sui template utilizzabili

review_title: Si quieres vídeos impactantes es tu herramienta
description: Herramienta para crear vídeo muy muy fácil de utilizar y con un gran resultado final
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: La increíble facilidad de uso y la gran cantidad de templates que tienen para casi todo (marketing, social media..). En pocos minutos puedes crear publicaciones impactantes. La usamos a diario en nuestra empresa en redes sociales.
cons: Cuando llevas un tiempo usándola algunas plantillas pueden parecer "repetitivas". Otras veces no encuentras un template que se adapte justo a la idea que tienes en mente.

description: Très bonne expérience > simple et efficace
author: Margaux M.
pros: Simplicité du logiciel, diversité des templates
cons: Plus d'écrans pour les interviews > mots-clés

author: Marine J.
pros: Il facilite notre communication au quotidien avec des vidéos qualitatives.
cons: Playplay ne permet pas de pouvoir changer les transitions.

review_title: Une plateforme de production simple d'utilisation pour des contenus impactants
description: PlayPlay est une plateforme dont ne pourrions plus nous passer.
author: Jean-François M.
pros: PlayPlay est simple d'utilisation et permet à des collaborateurs non-professionnels de la vidéo de produire du contenu à fort impact avec un investissement en temps réduit. Les possibilités offertes sont nombreuses, adaptées aux évolutions et permettent même une intégration poussée de la charte graphique de l'entreprise.
cons: Veiller à diversifier les possibilités offertes afin que les contenus produits par les clients ne se ressemblent pas (animations, transitions, musiques...)

author: sonia V.
pros: facilité d'usage, industrialisation de la vidéo, autonomie tout en ayant la possibilité d'être accompagné si besoin, écoute et évolution du produit
cons: rigidité des formats qui nous oblige parfois à compenser avec d'autres outils (Canva)

description: As a non-expert in video-making playplay has helped me create a lot of content at relatively cheap price point.
author: youssef G.
pros: Playplay is easy to use even for non-expert, it offers a lot of templates to use to better express your video
cons: There's nothing to dislike about playplay, it meets my needs

description: I enjoy using PlayPlay because it’s a pretty simple and intuitive platform: the multiple templates are easy to use, and the results are very qualitative. The diversity of the screens is really practical and allows the videos to be used on different media. I don’t think that I could do without PlayPlay anymore: I use it on a daily basis, and I recommend it!
author: Hélène M.
pros: - The screens' diversity - The fact that it's really easy to use - The fact that the videos are really qualitative
cons: - The price, which is a bit expensive for a start-up
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: La démocratisation du montage vidéo grâce à PlayPlay ! Merci !
description: La création d'une vidéo peut être chronophage et demander des connaissances approfondies sur des outils comme Adobe Premiere ou After Effect. PlayPlay démocratise le montage vidéo grâce à ses nombreux templates efficaces et une interface simple d'utilisation.
author: Vincent T.
pros: PlayPlay est un outil vidéo simple d'utilisation et qui permet de gagner un gain de temps et d'argent important. Plus besoin d'être un expert du montage vidéo pour faire des vidéos d'excellentes qualités grâce à cet outil intuitif. Mention spéciale à l'équipe Customer Success qui est très présente et réactive pour répondre à nos questions & demandes.
cons: Pas encore de sous-titrage possible mais est en développement et devrait être possible dans les mois à venir
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: PlayPlay, l'éditeur de vidéo idéal pour les entreprises
author: Adrien L.
pros: Je n'utilise pour l'instant que le mode gratuit, mais je suis déjà conquis ! Extrêmement simple d'utilisation, cet outil en ligne permet à n'importe qui de créer des vidéos courtes et dynamiques à la "Brut" en quelques clics. Les possibilités de montages en version payante font très pro, même pour l'abonnement premier prix standard.
cons: La version payante entreprise me paraît très chère de prime abord. Pour rentabiliser, cela oblige à faire beaucoup de vidéos régulièrement, dommage qu'il n'existe pas d'abonnement plus "light" dédiée aux entreprises qui n'ont pas la culture vidéo aussi poussée ! Le tarif Standard semble suffire...
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Our experience overall has been excellent. Having Playplay has been such a time-saver that it feels like adding a new person to the team.
author: Lukas E.
pros: Playplay makes it incredibly easy to make a professionally-looking product in almost no time. It is intuitive and easy to use for anyone at any level.
cons: Likely to make it easier to use, it does lack a few features that we would like, but the team behind it is very receptive to feedback.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: L'outil a permis de combler un manque : - de contenu dynamique / vidéos de la part des équipes Central - de se substituer aux agences / motion en freelance, trop coûteux
author: Léa F.
pros: Facile et ludique - possibilité de créer du contenu de qualité sans connaissance pratique Qualité du rendu, gain de temps avec l'adaptation des formats
cons: Templates parfois un peu redondants, complexité pour le partage entre membres d'une même équipe
